query:
-- deal_versions: v1 snapshot
INSERT INTO deal_versions (dealId, orgId, version, payload, actorOpenId, reason, createdAt)
VALUES (
  'demo-summit-hvac',
  1,
  1,
  '{
    "id": "demo-summit-hvac",
    "companyName": "Summit HVAC Services",
    "industry": "HVAC",
    "location": "Denver, CO",
    "stage": "Under Analysis",
    "annualRevenue": 2500000,
    "annualSDE": 450000,
    "annualEBITDA": 375000,
    "askingPrice": 1800000,
    "ownerRole": "Owner-operator, handles all major client relationships and bids",
    "revenueTrend": "growing",
    "customerConcentrationPct": 22,
    "recurringRevenuePct": 40,
    "employeeCount": 14,
    "yearsInBusiness": 11,
    "geography": "Colorado Front Range",
    "dealStructure": "asset",
    "isDemo": true,
    "isTest": false
  }',
  'HH9R8dErn8y8z3SgbFd7PD',
  'create',
  '2026-04-10 14:00:00'
);

-- audit_log: deal.create
INSERT INTO audit_log (orgId, actorOpenId, actorName, action, targetType, targetId, diff, summary, createdAt)
VALUES (
  1,
  'HH9R8dErn8y8z3SgbFd7PD',
  'Los Silva',
  'deal.create',
  'deal',
  'demo-summit-hvac',
  '[{"field":"companyName","before":null,"after":"Summit HVAC Services"},{"field":"stage","before":null,"after":"Under Analysis"},{"field":"annualRevenue","before":null,"after":2500000},{"field":"annualSDE","before":null,"after":450000},{"field":"askingPrice","before":null,"after":1800000}]',
  'Deal created: Summit HVAC Services',
  '2026-04-10 14:00:00'
);

-- Comment 1: resolved (normal comment, resolved by same user)
INSERT INTO comments (dealId, orgId, authorOpenId, body, resolvedAt, resolvedByOpenId, isBlocker, deletedAt, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (
  'demo-summit-hvac',
  1,
  'HH9R8dErn8y8z3SgbFd7PD',
  'Reviewed 3 years of tax returns and P&L statements — financials are clean and consistent with the stated $450K SDE. Add-backs are well-documented. No red flags on the revenue side.',
  '2026-04-28 11:15:00',
  'HH9R8dErn8y8z3SgbFd7PD',
  0,
  NULL,
  '2026-04-22 09:45:00',
  '2026-04-28 11:15:00'
);

-- Comment 2: unresolved blocker
INSERT INTO comments (dealId, orgId, authorOpenId, body, resolvedAt, resolvedByOpenId, isBlocker, deletedAt, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (
  'demo-summit-hvac',
  1,
  'HH9R8dErn8y8z3SgbFd7PD',
  '**BLOCKER — Owner Dependency Risk**: Owner is the sole estimator and holds all key client relationships. 11 years of institutional knowledge with no documented succession plan or key-man transition protocol. This must be resolved before IC — require a written transition plan and at minimum 6-month seller earnout tied to client retention before we can proceed.',
  NULL,
  NULL,
  1,
  NULL,
  '2026-05-01 09:30:00',
  '2026-05-01 09:30:00'
);
